comment.body: Oh, come on, Substack has the most intuitive user-friendly interface ever!  Try this:  On a web browser, go to your substack home page (house icon on left), then click your profile picture/icon in the top right, a dropdown menu should appear, select "settings", you'll then see your subscriptions, click on Stochastic Volatility, then (drumroll please) check your notification settings to make sure emails is on for the posts.  If that's not the issue, then I'm out of ideas.
